overall.description: First-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic advertisements, and street vendors. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine render with atmospheric fog and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open street

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open street with green neon lighting
slight right turn toward the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overhang, moving toward the open street

entered.detail: dark overhang covering the sidewalk with structural beams visible
vertical columns illuminated with bright green neon light
large illuminated sign with 'UNDER INC' text in white and blue
metal and concrete barrier separating sidewalk from street
glowing advertisements visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered urban walkway with green neon lighting on the right, approaching an open intersection. The 'Under Inc' sign glows brightly as the camera moves forward along the wet concrete sidewalk.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with traffic lights and vehicles in distance
entering open intersection area with tall buildings on all sides

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow striped crosswalk, heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving down the wet street

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
food stall with red 'BURRITO' neon signage and illuminated menu
vertical traffic signal showing red light
high-rise structure with vertical neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes. A 'Burrito' food stand glows on the right as vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt, and tall buildings with vertical neon signage rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with dense neon signage

events.description: entering area with dominant pink and red neon lighting replacing green tones
passing under overhead neon signs and commercial awnings

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow street passing various storefronts and dense neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical sign with '24' in bright pink neon characters
overhanging roof with green and red neon edge lighting
tall building facade covered with vertical neon advertisements
pedestrian walkway or bridge connecting buildings overhead with neon trim

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrower commercial street dominated by pink and red neon signage, including a prominent '24' sign. The street is lined with storefronts and awnings, with pedestrians walking in both directions under the glow of holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with illuminated food vendor cart

events.description: approaching street food vendor with illuminated cart and cooking equipment
slowing down while passing close to the vendor cart

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe the street vendor and passing closely by the food cart

notable_agents.action: food vendor working at illuminated cart, cooking on grill with visible steam
pedestrian in blue cap and suspenders walking past vendor

entered.detail: street food cart with bright red and blue neon lighting and illuminated grill surface
large umbrella with orange and green sections shading the cart
white plastic seating arranged near the vendor cart
bridge connecting buildings with glowing signage underneath

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street food vendor with a brightly lit neon cart at the sidewalk's edge. The vendor tends to a glowing grill under an umbrella while pedestrians pass by, and the camera moves slowly past the cart before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban corridor into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a rain-soaked cyberpunk district. It begins under a covered walkway illuminated by green neon and the glow of an Under Inc sign, moving steadily forward along a wet concrete sidewalk toward an open intersection. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the environment expands into a wide crossing with yellow stripes and passing vehicles, where a glowing Burrito stand and towering vertical signage define the skyline. The scene then shifts into a narrower commercial street dominated by pink and red holographic advertisements and a prominent 24 sign, with pedestrians weaving through the glow of various storefronts. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches a street food vendor tending a glowing grill under an umbrella, gliding past the brightly lit cart at the sidewalk's edge.
